# Neil Dave — AI Solution Architect
# https://theneildave.in
# llms.txt — machine-readable site overview for AI language models

## About
Neil Dave is an AI Solution Architect and Generative AI Engineer based in Bangalore, India, with 7+ years of experience in Machine Learning, Deep Learning, Generative AI (LLMs), and Computer Vision. He has built and deployed production AI systems across healthcare, sports analytics, and enterprise technology — including projects for Mumbai Indians (IPL). He holds a PGP in AI & Data Science from Jio Institute and has 3 peer-reviewed publications (IEEE, Springer).

Wikidata entity: https://www.wikidata.org/wiki/Q138716797

## Canonical titles
- AI Solution Architect (primary)
- Generative AI Engineer (secondary)

## Services
- LLM Engineering & RAG Pipeline Design
- Computer Vision Systems
- MLOps & LLMOps
- Responsible AI Audits
- AI Strategy & Roadmap for SMBs
- Enterprise AI Consulting
- AI Keynote Speaking & Workshops
